zh-CN.name: 字母M
zh-CN.intro: 字母M是第13个字母，就像数字13。M像两座山，13里有1和3，它们手拉手一起玩。

story.title: 🏔️M像两座山，13个小精灵
story.body: 快看，字母M像两座大山手拉手。M是第13个字母，数字13来啦！让我们数一数：1、2、3...12、13！13个小精灵排成队。第一个小精灵叫1，第二个叫3，它们抱在一起变成13。13比12多一个，比14少一个。我们可以用13颗糖果来数：一颗、两颗...十三颗！哇，好甜。M和13是好朋友，一个在字母表里唱歌，一个在数字表里跳舞。记住13哦，它很温暖，就像妈妈的手握住你的小手，一步一步陪你长大。

knowledge.title: 为什么M是第13个字母？
knowledge.body: 英文字母表从A开始，一个一个排好队。M排在中间，它是第13个。从A数到M，就是1到13，是不是很有趣？

en.name: Thirteen
en.intro: Thirteen is the number that comes after twelve. The letter M is the 13th letter, just like number 13. It's fun to count!

story.title: 🏔️M is like mountains, 13 little friends
story.body: Look, letter M looks like two mountains holding hands. M is the 13th letter, and here comes number 13! Let's count: one, two, three... twelve, thirteen! Thirteen little friends in a row. The first is 1, the second is 3, they hug and make 13. Thirteen is one more than twelve, one less than fourteen. We can count with 13 candies: one candy, two candies... thirteen candies! Yummy. M and 13 are good friends, one sings in the alphabet, the other dances in the number line. Remember 13, it's warm and happy, like a hug from Mommy.

knowledge.title: Why is M the 13th letter?
knowledge.body: The English alphabet starts with A and goes in order. M is right in the middle, it's the 13th. Count from A to M, and you get 1 to 13.
